Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Amsterdam/design-system/git/trees/main?recursive=1" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
data=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# All component directories in storybook
components = set\(\)
for t in data.get\('tree',[]\):
    if t['path'].startswith\('storybook/src/components/'\) and '/' in t['path'][len\('storybook/src/components/'\):]:
        comp = t['path'].split\('/'\)[3]
        components.add\(comp\)
for c in sorted\(components\):
    print\(c\)
" 2>/dev/null)
